IERC20.balanceOf(address).source_code: function balanceOf(address account) external view returns (uint256);

IERC20.transfer(address,uint256).source_code: function transfer(address recipient, uint256 amount) external returns (bool);

IERC20.allowance(address,address).source_code: function allowance(address owner, address spender) external view returns (uint256);

IERC20.approve(address,uint256).source_code: function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) external returns (bool);

IERC20.transferFrom(address,address,uint.source_code: function transferFrom(address sender, address recipient, uint256 amount) external returns (bool);
